svg.title: Cloud Security POC Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing user traffic flowing through FortiGate, Chatbot App, FortiAIGate with two AI Guard policies, then splitting into Path A (agentic tool use via LLM Wrapper, OpenAI, FortiWeb, MCP Server) and Path B (AWS Bedrock standard LLM chat).
svg.text: Scans all traffic: prompt injection · DLP · toxicity
